title: Backend Developer Vacancy at mfine - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at mfine - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
mfine invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Backend Developer at our Allahabad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About mfine:
mfine is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Java

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Flexible working hours
• Professional development and training programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with mfine!
